case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. SVETLANA KASHCHENKO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KASHCHENKO, SVETLANA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED AUG-22-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KASHCHENKO, SVETLANA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
